suite.name: EX02 Login DataDriver

test.name: Login with the Admin1 and admin123

kw.name: Open the browser and go to OrangeHRM
Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Edge WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Verification of User Login
wait until element is visible in the page
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: MicrosoftEdge=149.0.4022.69) Stacktrace: msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff62bd06925+e305] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff62bd06984+e364] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff62c3888fa+6902da] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff62b69835d] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff62b72303e] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff62b73936f] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff62b6f485c] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff62b6f3ab6] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff62b6f4683] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff62b942ca1] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff62b93f3f8] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff62b94fe85] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff62bd228d1+2a2b1] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff62bd2b676+33056] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff62bd0e3e4+15dc4] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff62bd0e505+15ee5] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff62bcfab13+24f3] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff86926e957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff86a607c1c+2c]

kw.name: wait until element is visible in the page
verify the 'Required' field validation messages appear
